description: Evidence about the structure of the Alfven continuum near its quartic minimum (Friman-Rotenberg, Hameiri-Lust-Hameiri operators) and the discrete spectrum accumulating there.

open_questions.question: Are the implicit-headline claim(s) A_04 actually intended to generalize across this group, or do their authors scope them more narrowly than the propagator assumes?

suggested_next_steps.description: Read each implicit-headline claim's source paper and decide whether to add explicit out-of-regime predictions or to mark the claim as scoped only to its home regime.
suggested_next_steps.title: Scope verification

scope.framework: MHD literature; ideal MHD Atlas H1-H5

title: Continuum spectrum near the Alfven minimum
